calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Continued To Apr-05-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Set For Trial On Oct-05-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $10,320.00
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
FRANK H. KIM, ESQ., KIM LEGAL, APC (323) 482-3300 fkim@kim-legal.com Attorney for Plaintiff
KAREN CHANG
Ariel P. Kahn, Esq., JACKSON LEWIS P.C. (415) 394-9400 Ariel.Kahn@jacksonlewis.com Attorney for Defendant WILLIAM DUFF ARCHITECTS, INC..

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WILLIAM DUFF ARCHITECTS, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $10,320.00

Defendant William Duff Architects, Inc. (Duff) moves for an order compelling plaintiff Karen Chang to supplement her responses to certain discovery. For the reasons stated herein, the court grants the motion in part, denies it in part, and orders Chang to pay $6000 in sanctions to Duff within 30 days of entry of this order.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling n compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-12-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
